jobs.title: DevOps Engineer Job Apeiro
jobs.description: Reports To:DevOps Lead, with a dotted reporting line to Senior Engineering Manager
responsibilities: Deploy, manage and maintain Kubernetes clusters
Perform Kubernetes upgrades, scaling, monitoring, and troubleshooting
Create and manage Windows and Ubuntu virtual machines
Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and GitHub Actions (Both)
Automate infrastructure and Application tasks using Python and PowerShell
Manage end-to-end AWS cloud infrastructure (EC2, VPC, IAM, S3, RDS, EKS, ECS, Lambda, etc.)
requirements: 5 –10 Years of hands-on DevOps experience
Strong Kubernetes cluster deployment and management skills
Hands-on AWS cloud experience
Experience with Windows and Ubuntu VM management
Proficiency in Python scripting and PowerShell
jobs.howToApply: Please submit your CV and cover letter toKenya.Careers@apeiro.digital. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.

jobs.title: Solutions Architect Job Apeiro
jobs.description: We are seeking a highly experienced Solution Architect to lead end-to-end architecture across a national portfolio of digital health platforms. The Platforms in this scope will be as below:
responsibilities: Define and maintain enterprise architecture aligned to the Kenya Health Enterprise Architecture (KHEA) and DHA standards.
Lead solution design across clinical, financing, supply chain, AI, and analytics systems.
Architect interoperable systems using HL7 FHIR and OpenHIE principles.
Design and oversee implementation of a national health data lake integrating clinical, claims, logistics, fraud, and quality data.
Establish scalable analytics frameworks for dashboards, AI/ML deployment, predictive fraud detection, and utilization analysis.
Ensure secure, sovereign, and compliant cloud deployment aligned to Kenya Data Protection requirements.
requirements: Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Health Informatics, Information Systems, Data Science, or a related field.
Bachelor’s degree in a relevant technical discipline (required).
Professional certifications (TOGAF, Cloud Architecture, Health Informatics) are an added advantage.
jobs.howToApply: Please submit your CV and cover letter toKenya.Careers@apeiro.digital. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.

jobs.title: L1 SOC-NOC Engineer Job Apeiro
jobs.description: This onsite role provides the first line of operational support across Security and Network domains—triaging security alerts, monitoring network availability, executing SOP-driven actions, and escalating effectively to specialised L2/L3 teams.
responsibilities: Apply Security (50%): SIEM/EDR monitoring, IOC enrichment, phishing triage, basic containment actions, ticket management, SOAR playbook execution.
Network (50%): NMS monitoring, link/device health checks, first-line diagnostics, vendor/ISP coordination, standard changes.
Operational Excellence: Maintain run-books, contribute to KB, ensure SLA adherence, and complete thorough shift handovers.
Cross-Functional Coordination: Collaborate with Incident Response, Network Engineering, Cloud, and Service Desk.
requirements: Security: SIEM/EDR basics, malware/phishing fundamentals, identity and endpoint hygiene basics.
Networking: TCP/IP, VLANs, routing basics, VPNs, Wi-Fi basics, firewall fundamentals.
Tooling: ServiceNow/Jira; SolarWinds/PRTG; Sentinel/Splunk/QRadar; Defender/CrowdStrike; basic SOAR familiarity.
Process: ITIL® incident/change, SOP adherence, documentation discipline.
Soft Skills: Clear communication, prioritizations, collaboration in shift-based environment.
jobs.howToApply: Please submit your CV and cover letter toKenya.Careers@apeiro.digital. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis.

jobs.title: Engineer – Infrastructure SRE Job Safaricom
jobs.description: Reporting to the Manager – Infrastructure SRE, the role holder will be responsible for building, automating, operating, and continuously improving on-premises, hybrid, and multi-cloud infrastructure platforms using Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) and automation-first principles. The role ensures the availability, performance, scalability, and resilience of critical systems through engineering,
responsibilities: Uphold the company code of conduct, policies and procedures, ensuring integrity and accountability in every aspect of your work.
All employees have a responsibility to adhere to safety, health, and wellbeing  policies, guidelines and procedures in all actions and decisions
Implement and support SLIs, SLOs, and error budgets for assigned platforms and services.
Monitor platform health, availability, latency, and error rates and participate in on-call rotations, incident response, and major incident recovery.

Design and implement end-to-end infrastructure automation across on-premise data centers, private cloud, and public cloud environments. premise data centers, private cloud, and public cloud environments. premise data centers, private cloud, and public cloud environments.
Build and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform, Ansible, and Helm. Automate infrastructure provisioning, scaling, patching, recovery, and decommissioning.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related technical field.
Proven hands-on experience supporting production infrastructure and cloud platforms.
Strong automation mindset with demonstrated reduction of manual operational tasks.
Experience working within ITIL / DevOps / SRE operating models.
Preferred Certifications (Added Advantage)

jobs.description: 3.Stay relevant in a competitive job market.Register for short professional courses starting next month.See courses starting next month.
responsibilities: Collaborate with the Programme Manager for Digital Systems to implement the Digital Trade and Systems initiatives under Market Access and Business Competitiveness outcomes in TMA’s Strategy.
Assist the Director, Digital Systems in designing and implementing innovative Digital Technologies and Systems for Trade.

Work closely with the Programme Management Team (within the department and with other teams) to effectively plan and implement the Digital System programme and projects in TMA, supporting the Digital Systems Director in programme delivery for designated projects.
Drive innovation by developing specific trade use cases applicable to emerging and trending ICTs, fostering the development of systems and applications for trade agencies.
Design and Implement Digital Systems solutions for projects assigned by the Digital Systems Director.

Oversee the technical delivery of Digital Systems projects by coordinating with other managers and officers of the Programme, for projects where the holder is designated as Project Leader or Technical Lead and support other leads where they are not the designated person.
requirements: An undergraduate degree in a relevant discipline such; Computer Science, Information Systems, Information Technology, Business Technology, Information Science, Informatics or closely related.

jobs.title: Backend Engineer Job SasaPay
jobs.description: Send your resume and a brief cover letter highlighting your experience with scalable backend systems tohr@viewtech.co.keby 12th March 2026.
responsibilities: System Architecture: Design and maintain scalable server-side logic and high-concurrency architectures.
API Design: Build and optimize secure RESTful and/or GraphQL APIs for web and mobile integrations.
Performance Engineering: Implement caching strategies (e.g., Redis) and optimize database queries to ensure low-latency responses.
State Management: Develop complex workflows, such as USSD session handling and asynchronous task processing.
Code Quality: Write clean, testable, and maintainable code while enforcing standards through rigorous code reviews.
Database Management: Architect relational schema designs and manage data migrations using ORMs and raw SQL where necessary.
requirements: Experience: 3+ years of professional experience in backend development using high-level languages (Python, Go, or Ruby).
Technical Depth: Strong proficiency in a major web framework and a deep understanding of MVC/MVT patterns.
Data Modeling: Expert knowledge of relational databases (PostgreSQL or MySQL) and performance tuning.
API Ecosystems: Proven track record of building and documenting production-grade APIs.
Testing & CI/CD: Experience with automated testing frameworks and version control (Git).
jobs.howToApply: Send your resume and a brief cover letter highlighting your experience with scalable backend systems tohr@viewtech.co.keby 12th March 2026.

Develops strong knowledge base specific to a particular domain.
Conducts technology related assessments.
Maintains relevant documentation and supports the pre-sales process.
requirements: Good working knowledge and understanding of IT industry environment and business needs.
Excellent understanding of multi-technology infrastructure design couple with strategic thinking ability.
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
Interpersonal skills with the ability to develop and maintain strong stakeholder relationships.
Knowledge of systems, software and programing languages.

jobs.title: Flutter Developer Job Peach Cars
jobs.description: The Flutter Developer will lead the development and evolution of our mobile ecosystem. This role requires a highly autonomous engineer who can translate product requirements into intuitive mobile experiences, prototype user interfaces for review, and deliver production-ready features with minimal supervision.
responsibilities: Translate product requirements into scalable, maintainable Flutter implementations, integrating with backend APIs and ensuring feature completeness.
requirements: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT or any other relevant course.
5+ years of professional mobile development experience, with strong hands-on experience in Flutter and Dart.
Proven ability to implement complete mobile features independently from requirement to deployment.
Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, JSON payload handling, authentication flows, and state management approaches (e.g., Provider, Riverpod, Bloc, etc.).
Experience designing mobile interfaces and applying modern mobile design principles (Material Design, responsive layouts, accessibility considerations).

jobs.title: ICT Lecturer Job TEAU
jobs.description: We are seeking a highly qualified, dynamic, and passionate ICT Lecturer to join our growing Department of Information and Communication Technology. The successful candidate will play a pivotal role in shaping the next generation of technology professionals through quality teaching, mentorship, and academic leadership.
responsibilities: Participate in departmental meetings, faculty boards, academic committees, and institutional governance structures.
Contribute to module and programme review, accreditation processes, and quality assurance activities.
Assist in the coordination of departmental events, workshops, seminars, hackathons, and industry engagements.
Perform student examination invigilation, marking, and moderation duties as required.
Maintain accurate academic records, submission of marks, and completion of administrative reports within required deadlines.
Assist the Head of Department in any other reasonable academic and administrative duties that support the efficient running of the department.
requirements: Master’s Degree in Information Technology,Computer Science,Software Engineering, Information Systems, or a closely related field from a recognised and accredited institution.
A strong academic record demonstrating breadth of knowledge across core computing disciplines including programming,networks, databases, and systems analysis.
Evidence of continued professional development or further academic study in relevant ICT areas.
A minimum of twenty-four (24) publication points, of which at least sixteen (16) should be from refereed journal papers
